01-eingang.jpg.alt: The illuminated entrance sign of the Jurassic World VelociCoaster at night
01-eingang.jpg.caption: The opening act: right at the entrance sign it's clear that what's waiting here isn't just a coaster, but a piece of Jurassic World.

02-raptor-paddock.jpg.alt: An animatronic velociraptor head in the paddock area of the VelociCoaster queue
02-raptor-paddock.jpg.caption: Right in the middle of the Raptor Paddock: the animals are close enough to touch — you're not waiting for a ride, you're touring an enclosure.

03-atrium.jpg.alt: A velociraptor figure in the leafy atrium of the VelociCoaster station
03-atrium.jpg.caption: The atrium just before the launch — jungle, concrete and raptors. Occupied time in its purest form: there's something to see right up to the last second.
